metadata.direction: Sentence ID → list of word IDs that appear in this sentence.

field_notes.mapping: Reverse of word-to-sentences. Enables 'what vocabulary does this sentence teach?' queries.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/core/words.json, data/corpus/sentences.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
